response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the first song 'i-Life' (アイライフ) and the second song 'Kaiju no Hanauta' (怪獣の花唄). Used on-screen lyrics for transcription of the first song and verified the second song against the reference JSON. Subtitles are split at audio pauses and phrase ends to ensure timing precision and semantic continuity. Instrumental sections and long pauses are left silent.

subtitles.english: If you're ready to love that person,

subtitles.english: Then shout it out!

subtitles.original: グーチョキパーで
subtitles.english: With Rock, Paper, Scissors,

subtitles.original: グーチョキパーで
subtitles.english: With Rock, Paper, Scissors,

subtitles.original: 何作ろう？ 何作ろう？
subtitles.english: What shall we make? What shall we make?

subtitles.original: 右手をパーで 左手もパーで
subtitles.english: Right hand is Paper, left hand is Paper too...

subtitles.original: 君に会いたい！ ねえ会いたい！
subtitles.english: I want to see you! Hey, I want to see you!

subtitles.original: ねえ会いたい！ ねえ会いたい！ ねえ会いたい！
subtitles.english: Hey, I want to see you! Hey, I want to see you!

subtitles.original: いつでも i に KITE!
subtitles.english: Come to 'i' anytime!

subtitles.original: 運命の出アイ 誓うポライ
subtitles.english: Fated encounter, I swear to the future

subtitles.original: 不眠不休で遊ぼうぜ！
subtitles.english: Let's play through the night without sleep!

subtitles.original: フルパワーで飛べ！
subtitles.english: Fly at full power!

subtitles.original: 会いたい！ ねえ会いたい！ ねえ会いたい！
subtitles.english: I want to see you! Hey, I want to see you!

subtitles.original: 今すぐ i に KITE!
subtitles.english: Come to 'i' right now!

subtitles.original: 届け アイぼっちライ
subtitles.english: Reach them, my lonely love

subtitles.original: フッきって騒ぎ散らせ
subtitles.english: Break free and cause a ruckus

subtitles.original: 新規手もあげて (ハイハイ！)
subtitles.english: New fans, put your hands up! (Hi-Hi!)

subtitles.original: 古参もあげて (ハイハイ！)
subtitles.english: Old fans, put them up too! (Hi-Hi!)

subtitles.original: スタッフさんもあげて！！！ (いぇーい！)
subtitles.english: Staff members, raise them high!!! (Yay!)

subtitles.original: 心も体も飛び跳ねる
subtitles.english: Heart and body both jumping high

subtitles.original: 君も今日からアイライファー
subtitles.english: From today, you're an i-Lifer too

subtitles.original: いつまでもずっとアイライファー
subtitles.english: Forever and ever, an i-Lifer

subtitles.original: アイドルファンって こんなに体力使うんだね
subtitles.english: Being an idol fan takes so much energy...

subtitles.original: 痩せたわー
subtitles.english: I lost weight!

subtitles.original: コール側が楽しい
subtitles.english: Doing the chants is so fun!

subtitles.original: いい曲だこれ
subtitles.english: What a great song.

subtitles.original: じゃあ次、歌っていただくのは...
subtitles.english: Now, for our next performer...

subtitles.original: 風真いく？ この流れで？
subtitles.english: Kazama, you going? After that?

subtitles.original: タンバリン持ったところ申し訳ないが
subtitles.english: I'm sorry, you've got the tambourine and everything...

subtitles.original: 確かにこのメンバーでいくとしたらござるなのかい
subtitles.english: True, in this lineup, I guess it has to be de-gozaru.

subtitles.original: よし、じゃあ頑張って歌っていただきましょう
subtitles.english: Alright, let's have her give it her best!

subtitles.original: 怪獣の花唄 大好き
subtitles.english: Monster's Flower Song, I love it!

subtitles.original: いい曲だこれ 大好き
subtitles.english: It's such a good song, I love it.

subtitles.original: やばい今日に限って低い声が全然出...
subtitles.english: Oh no, today of all days, my low notes won't...

subtitles.original: チューニング チューニング
subtitles.english: Tuning, tuning...

subtitles.original: テンション上げたからね
subtitles.english: I got too pumped up.

subtitles.original: 思い出すのは君の歌
subtitles.english: What I remember is your song,

subtitles.original: 会話よりも鮮明だ
subtitles.english: It's clearer than any conversation.

subtitles.original: どこに行ってしまったの
subtitles.english: Where did you go?

subtitles.original: いつも探すんだよ
subtitles.english: I'm always looking for you.

subtitles.original: 思い出すのは君の歌
subtitles.english: What I remember is your song,

subtitles.original: 歌い笑う顔が鮮明だ
subtitles.english: I see your face singing and smiling so clearly.

subtitles.original: 君に似合うんだよ
subtitles.english: That suits you so well,

subtitles.original: ずっと見ていたいよ
subtitles.english: I want to keep looking at you.

subtitles.original: でも最後に見たいのは
subtitles.english: But the last thing I want to see is...

subtitles.original: きっともう君の夢の中
subtitles.english: I bet it's already inside your dream.

subtitles.original: もう一度 また聞かせてくれよ
subtitles.english: One more time, let me hear it again,

subtitles.original: 聞きたいんだ
subtitles.english: I want to hear it.

subtitles.original: もっと騒げ怪獣の歌
subtitles.english: Make more noise, monster's song,

subtitles.original: まだ消えない夢の歌唱えて
subtitles.english: Sing the dream song that hasn't faded yet.

subtitles.original: 君がいつも歌う怪獣の歌
subtitles.english: The monster's song you always sing,

subtitles.original: まだ消えない 口ずさんでしまうよ
subtitles.english: It hasn't faded, I find myself humming it.

subtitles.original: 思い出すのは君がいた
subtitles.english: I remember that you were there,

subtitles.original: ギター持ってる君がいた
subtitles.english: You were there with your guitar.

subtitles.original: 忘れられないんだよ
subtitles.english: I can't forget it,

subtitles.original: だから僕が歌うよ
subtitles.english: So I will sing it now.

subtitles.original: でも最後に見たいのは
subtitles.english: But the last thing I want to see is...

subtitles.english: I want to hear it.

subtitles.english: Make more noise, monster's song,

subtitles.english: The monster's song you always sing,

subtitles.english: It hasn't faded, I find myself humming it.

subtitles.original: 落ちてく過去は鮮明で
subtitles.english: The falling past is vivid,

subtitles.original: 見せたい未来は繊細で
subtitles.english: The future I want to show is delicate,

subtitles.english: To you, who are oblivious to the passing days.
